column1: # Densified lifecycle grid for parameter surface figure.
# 4 K_NURSES levels x 5 ooz_survival levels x 5 nurse_mortality levels = 100 cells
# Original 36-cell grid (3x3 ooz/mort) is a strict subset of this grid.
# Asexual fecundity constants locked: phoros_per_nurse=10, gonos_per_phoro=2, eggs_per_gono=2 (A=40)
# Selfing rate descriptive only - mtDNA matrilineal in this model.
# columns: combo_id  K_NURSES  ooz_survival  nurse_mortality  phoros  gonos  eggs  selfing
